title: lysimachia ovalis
intro: Lysimachia ovalis, also known as golden seal or columbine, is a perennial plant belonging to the primrose family (Primulaceae) native to North America. The medicinal properties of Lysimachia ovalis lie in its roots, which contain berberine, a compound with antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to boost the immune system, treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, and exhibit antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Lysimachia ovalis can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
